channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Wildfires in Wales and Across UK Trigger Major Incident Response
item.description: A major incident has been declared in north Wales following a large-scale wildfire that has prompted evacuations and emergency responses across the UK. Firefighters are working under challenging condi...

item.title: Venezuela's Economic Crisis Persists Despite US Intervention
item.description: Six months after the US raid that captured Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro, locals report little improvement in the country's dire economic situation. Despite claims by former President Donald Tru...

item.title: Rising CO₂ levels threaten large bees and disrupt pollinator ecosystems
item.description: Pollinators like bees, hoverflies, and birds are vital for maintaining healthy ecosystems and food production. However, climate change, particularly rising carbon dioxide levels, poses a significant t...

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Drama Between Gabo and Victor in Coco Martin’s Sigabo
item.description: The article provides an exclusive look at the intense on-set interactions between actors Gabo Magtibay and Victor Tigre Zafra during filming of Coco Martin’s television series 'Sigabo'. The behind-the...

item.title: Minister Umahi Confirms Death Of Staff Member At His Residence, Calls For Autopsy
item.description: David Umahi, Nigeria’s Works Minister, confirmed that Mary Habila, a physiotherapist seconded to his residence from the David Umahi Federal University of Health Sciences, died at his Uburu home. He re...

item.title: Waterspout Spotted Off Prince Edward Island Coast: Islanders Experience Rare Natural Phenomenon
item.description: Laura MacNeil, a seasoned shoreline tour guide in P.E.I., and her group witnessed a rare waterspout off the Vernon Bridge area on Saturday morning. The event, confirmed by the Northern Tornadoes Proje...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Highlights Gaps in Public Servant Financial Disclosure System
item.description: The Madlanga Commission has uncovered significant flaws in South Africa's financial disclosure system for public servants, according to testimony by Dr Albertus Schoeman, a World Bank anti-corruption ...

item.title: US and Allies Reaffirm Commitment to 2016 South China Sea Tribunal Ruling
item.description: The United States Embassy in the Philippines, along with Australia, Canada, Estonia, Germany, Italy, Japan, Latvia, Lithuania, New Zealand, Romania, Slovenia, and the United Kingdom, jointly reaffirme...

item.title: Jannik Sinner defeats Zverev to retain Wimbledon title in thrilling final
item.description: Italian top seed Jannik Sinner retained his Wimbledon crown by overcoming a fierce challenge from Alexander Zverev in a three-hour, four-minute final. The match, which ended 6-7(7) 7-6(2) 6-3 6-4, saw...

item.title: Tarbela-5 cofferdam collapse leads to two-year delay and 285% cost surge
item.description: The collapse of the Tarbela-5 Extension Hydropower Project's cofferdam has caused significant delays and a massive cost escalation, with stakeholders including Wapda, the contractor, and consultant fa...

item.title: Pulp Perform 'Common People' at Mad Cool 2026 Amid England's Victory Celebration
item.description: At Mad Cool 2026, Pulp delivered an epic closing set that coincided with England's 2-1 victory over Norway. The performance, which included a triumphant rendition of 'Common People', became a focal po...

item.title: New Voters Required to Submit Parents' SIR Details for Electoral Roll Inclusion
item.description: The Election Commission (EC) has mandated that new voters applying to be included in electoral rolls must provide details of their parents' Special Intensive Revision (SIR) status. This requirement, a...

item.title: Tragic Incident: AI Engineer's Girlfriend Killed In Gurugram PG, Boyfriend Commits Suicide
item.description: A tragic incident unfolded in Gurugram where a 25-year-old woman was found dead in a pool of blood inside her paying guest (PG) accommodation after her family reported her missing. The police traced h...

item.title: Oil Prices Rise Amid Escalating Tensions Between U.S. and Iran in Middle East
item.description: Oil prices surged by over 3% on Monday as tensions between the United States and Iran escalated, with both nations intensifying strikes on Gulf states and critical maritime routes. Brent crude futures...

item.title: Canadian Families Demand Justice After Iran Downing of Flight PS752
item.description: The article details the ongoing demands of families whose loved ones were killed in the 2016 downing of Ukrainian International Airlines Flight PS752 by Iranian missile fire. Hamed Esmaeilion, a Toron...

item.title: Two young South African sports stars pass away, leaving nation in mourning
item.description: Two young South African sports stars, Jayden Adams (25) and Luqobo Makwedini (20), have died tragically, sending the nation into mourning. Adams, a midfielder for Bafana Bafana and Mamelodi Sundowns, ...

item.title: APC Criticizes Opposition for Failing to Meet Election Deadline
item.description: The ruling party, APC, has accused opposition parties of lacking organizational discipline after failing to meet the deadline for uploading candidates to INEC's portal. The APC claimed that the opposi...

item.title: AtkinsRéalis Extends Civil Works Role at Sizewell C Nuclear Plant
item.description: AtkinsRéalis, a construction and engineering firm formerly known as SNC Lavalin, has signed a five-year framework agreement to continue its civil works role at the Sizewell C nuclear power plant in th...

item.title: Understanding LEN: HIV Prevention and Community Awareness in South Africa
item.description: The article explores the rollout of lenacapavir (LEN), an HIV prevention injection, and highlights the critical need for public understanding to combat misinformation. The author recounts a personal a...

item.title: Global News Roundup: U.S.-Iran tensions escalate, Bangkok tragedy, and key international developments
item.description: The article compiles a range of global news events from July 13, 2026. Key highlights include the U.S. launching additional strikes on Iran to counter threats to commercial ships in the Strait of Horm...
